creator: w.schwarzenfeld@utanet.at
text:
It don't work with lightdm on FreeBSD , I only want to test it.
Maybe an interesting detail (maybe only on my system)
Cause of the error message I tried to chmod all files in the work-directory.
It compiles a few lines further and then stated:
...permission denied /CHANGES.txt...
An this means the CHANGES.txt in the syszem root directory.
I tried to recompile all qt ports that I have installed (guessing there is something interfering), but changing nothing.
